title: paeonia lactiflora f. nuda
intro: Paeonia lactiflora f. nuda is a variety of the peony plant, also known as the garden peony, characterized by its unique, bare-stemmed flowers. Traditionally, the roots and petals of Paeonia lactiflora f. nuda have been used in herbal medicine, and are said to possess anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. The medicinal properties of this plant are believed to have several health benefits, including reducing anxiety and insomnia, alleviating menstrual cramps, and lowering blood pressure. Paeonia lactiflora f. nuda can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine.
